tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 九罭之魚，鱒魴。我覯之子，袞衣繡裳。 鴻飛遵渚，公歸無所。於女信處。 鴻飛遵陸，公歸不復。於女信宿。 是以有袞衣兮，無以我公歸兮，無使我心悲兮。

1 In the net with its nine bags Are rud and bream. We see this prince With his grand-ducal robe and embroidered skirt.
2 The wild geese fly [only] about the islets. The duke is returning； — is it not to his proper place? He was stopping with you [and me] but for a couple of nights.
3 The wild geese fly about the land. The duke is returning, and will not come back here? He was lodging with you [and me] but for a couple of nights.
4 Thus have we had the grand-ducal robe among us. Do not take our duke back [to the west]; Do not cause us such sorrow of heart.
